bbox.description:
CIDR: Classless InterDomain Routing (pronounced “cider”)
• subnet portion of address of arbitrary length
• address format: a.b.c.d/x, where x is # bits in subnet portion of address

wrong_prediction: CIDR: Classless InterDomain Routing (pronounced "rider") subnet portion of address of arbitrary length address format: a b.c. d)v, where w is # bits in subnet portion of address
correct_text:
CIDR: Classless InterDomain Routing (pronounced “cider”)
• subnet portion of address of arbitrary length
• address format: a.b.c.d/x, where x is # bits in subnet portion of address
